title: Portugal Legislative Election
description: Center-right Democratic Alliance wins snap election after PM Costa's resignation. Far-right Chega emerges as kingmaker in closest legislative race in Portuguese history.

title: Slovakia Presidential Election
description: Petr Pellegrini elected president in runoff, succeeding Zuzana Čaputová who chose not to run for re-election.

title: Finland Presidential Election
description: Alexander Stubb elected president in runoff against Jussi Halla-aho of the Finns Party, after incumbent Sauli Niinistö chose not to seek re-election.

title: Poland Presidential Election
description: Karol Nawrocki wins closely contested presidential election against Warsaw mayor Rafał Trzaskowski in narrow runoff.

title: Austria National Election
description: Freedom Party (FPÖ) becomes first far-right party to win national election in post-war Austria. Coalition negotiations begin without clear path to government.

title: Romania Presidential Election (Round 1)
description: Pro-Russian candidate Călin Georgescu surprises with strong first-round showing amid allegations of TikTok manipulation.

title: UK General Election
description: Labour Party wins massive landslide, ending 14 years of Conservative rule. Keir Starmer becomes Prime Minister.

title: Croatia Presidential Election
description: President Zoran Milanović wins re-election in a tight race against centrist challenger Dragan Primorac.

title: Denmark General Election
description: Mette Frederiksen's Social Democrats win again but lose parliamentary majority, leading to minority government.

title: Lithuania Presidential Election
description: Incumbent Gitanas Nausėda re-elected president with strong public support for his stance on security and Ukraine.

title: Belgium Federal Election
description: Flemish nationalist N-VA becomes largest party, but coalition talks drag on for over 200 days.

title: Latvia Parliamentary Election
description: New Unity coalition led by Evika Siliņa wins re-election with focus on economic stability and defense spending.

title: Netherlands General Election
description: Freedom Party (PVV) of Geert Wilders wins plurality but forms broadly-based coalition excluding far-right.

title: Germany Federal Election
description: CDU/CSU wins decisive victory under Friedrich Merz. Coalition negotiations begin with SPD for 'Germany Alliance' government.

title: Ireland General Election
description: Fine Gael and Fianna Fáil coalition loses majority but returns to power with independent support.

title: Czech Republic Presidential Election
description: Petr Pavel wins second term as president with strong approval ratings and popular support for EU integration.

title: Estonia Parliamentary Election
description: Reform Party wins under Kaja Kallas who continues as Prime Minister despite coalition shifts.

title: Hungary Parliamentary Election
description: Fidesz wins fourth consecutive supermajority under Viktor Orbán amid EU concerns about democratic backsliding.

title: Sweden General Election
description: Ulf Kristersson's centre-right government loses majority but continues as minority with SD support.

title: Malta General Election
description: Robert Abela's Labour Party wins third consecutive term with increased majority in parliament.

title: Greece Parliamentary Election
description: Kyriakos Mitsotakis's New Democracy party wins comfortable re-election with focus on economic growth.

title: Slovenia Parliamentary Election
description: Robert Golob's Freedom Movement retains power with improved majority in National Assembly.

title: Bulgaria Parliamentary Election
description: Continue the Change party forms government after fragmented election with seven parties in parliament.

title: Cyprus Presidential Election
description: Nikos Christodoulides re-elected president in first round with strong backing from business community.

title: France Legislative Election
description: National Rally and left-wing alliance compete intensely as Macron's camp faces major challenges.

title: Italy Senate Election
description: Giorgia Meloni's Brothers of Italy maintains strong position in parliament with European Parliament aligned policies.

title: Spain General Election
description: People's Party and Vox negotiations create shift in political landscape ahead of European Parliament elections.

title: Luxembourg General Election
description: Democratic Party forms new coalition after Luc Frieden's Christian Social People's Party gains ground.

title: Serbia Presidential Election
description: President Vučić wins re-election amid protests over electoral irregularities and EU alignment concerns.

title: Montenegro Parliamentary Election
description: Pro-European coalition takes power after decade of Democratic Party of Socialists rule.

title: Treaty of Rome Signed
description: Founding treaty of the European Economic Community signed by Belgium, France, Italy, Luxembourg, Netherlands, and West Germany in Rome.

title: Euro Currency Created
description: Euro currency is officially created as an accounting currency. Physical euro notes and coins enter circulation three years later.

title: Biggest EU Expansion
description: Ten new countries join the EU in the largest expansion: Cyprus, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Latvia, Lithuania, Malta, Poland, Slovakia, and Slovenia.

title: Treaty of Lisbon Signed
description: Reform treaty that amends the Maastricht Treaty and Treaty of Rome, creating a more efficient and democratic EU.

title: United Kingdom Leaves EU
description: Brexit is completed after years of negotiations following the 2016 referendum, making the UK the first country to leave the EU.

title: EU Vaccination Campaign Begins
description: Coordinated EU-wide vaccination campaign starts with Pfizer-BioNTech vaccine after regulatory approval.

title: Portugal Takes EU Presidency
description: Portugal begins six-month Council presidency, focusing on recovery from pandemic and EU-UK relations.

title: European Chips Act Announced
description: EU unveils plan to boost semiconductor production and reduce dependence on Asian suppliers.

title: EU Grants Candidate Status to Ukraine
description: European Council grants Ukraine and Moldova candidate status for EU membership in historic decision amid Russian invasion.

title: Silicon Valley Bank EU Subsidiaries
description: EU banking authorities intervene after SVB collapse, ensuring financial stability across European markets.

title: ECB Raises Rates to Record High
description: European Central Bank raises interest rates to highest level since euro creation, fighting persistent inflation.

title: EU AI Act Passed
description: European Parliament approves world's first comprehensive AI regulation, setting global standards for artificial intelligence.

title: European Parliament Elections
description: EU citizens vote in elections for the 720 members of the European Parliament, with shifts toward centre-right and green parties.

title: EU Border Security Deal
description: Member states approve controversial migration pact with expanded border procedures and processing centers.

title: EU Deforestation Regulation
description: New rules take effect requiring companies to prove products don't come from deforested land, affecting global supply chains.

title: New EU Budget Cycle Begins
description: Seven-year budget framework negotiations conclude with focus on defense, climate, and digital transition.

title: Ukraine EU Accession Talks
description: Ukraine opens formal EU accession negotiations, marking major milestone in country's European integration path.

title: Digital Euro Launch
description: European Central Bank launches digital euro pilot program, exploring blockchain-based central bank digital currency.

title: Hungary Takes EU Presidency
description: Hungary assumes Council presidency with agenda focused on competitiveness and agricultural policy reform.

title: Schengen Area Expands
description: Romania and Bulgaria fully join Schengen area, eliminating border controls in largest expansion since 2011.
